owners.187gsap: 187GSAP — core GSAP mechanics (sliders, cursors, transitions, nav, forms, loaders)
owners.187scroll: 187SCROLL — scroll-driven camera, parallax, and pinned narratives
owners.187hero: 187HERO — full-screen immersive hero and first-impression systems

entries.name: Adaptive Proximity Store Finder
entries.logic: Mapbox GL with `projection:mercator`; `watchPosition` for live geolocation; cluster markers via `supercluster`; auto-flyTo on load.

entries.name: Staggered Chromatic Scroll Wave
entries.logic: Split text into `<span>`s; apply conic gradients; `ScrollTrigger` with `scrub:1.5` animates `background-position` sinusoidally (delay = index * 0.02).

entries.name: Aperture-Based Dynamic Spotlight
entries.logic: Radial gradient overlay with `mix-blend-mode:screen`; `gsap.quickTo()` with 0.2s lag; scales on hover over interactive targets.

entries.name: Canvas Noise Overlay Engine
entries.logic: Offscreen canvas generates monochromatic noise (`fillRect`); capped at 30fps via frame-skipping; opacity tied to scroll/hover via `gsap.to`.

entries.name: Inertia-Orbital 3D Carousel
entries.logic: Cards in `rotateY` + `translateZ` circle; `Draggable` with `type:"rotation"`; `InertiaPlugin` snap; `onPress` pauses autoplay.

entries.name: Pinned Scroll-Journey Timeline
entries.logic: Pin wrapper; `ScrollTrigger` with `scrub:1` drives master timeline; connector line morphs (`scaleY`); content staggers in.

entries.name: Hardware-Accelerated Cube Flip
entries.logic: Four panels with `preserve-3d`; tween `rotateY` by 90°; `backface-visibility:hidden`; `ease:"power4.inOut"`; keyboard arrow support.

entries.name: Full-Screen Bottom Drawer
entries.logic: Height from `60px`→`100dvh`; stagger links with `y:50`; `backdrop-filter:blur(20px)`; focus trap inside drawer.

entries.name: Bounce-Physics Loader Stack
entries.logic: Cards fall from `y:-200` with `ease:"bounce.out"`; `stagger:0.08`; onComplete emits `loaded` event; loader fades out.

entries.name: Deck-Style Swipe Slider
entries.logic: Stack images with `x:20`/`scale:0.95`; `Draggable`; on release, top card flings off (`x:500`) and recycles to bottom.

entries.name: CSS-Perpetual Radial Ticker
entries.logic: Pure CSS `@keyframes` rotating parent; child items counter-rotate; `animation-play-state:paused` on hover.

entries.name: Binary-Search Text Squeeze
entries.logic: Uses `canvas.measureText` or `scrollWidth`; binary search between min/max font-size; debounced on resize.

entries.name: Helical Funnel Card Tornado
entries.logic: Cards arranged in helix (`rotateY` + `translateZ`); container spins continuously; scroll maps to `translateZ` offset for funnel effect.

entries.name: Accessible Animated Pill
entries.logic: Hidden `input[type=checkbox]`; styled pill with `::after`; `prefers-reduced-motion` disables animation; emits `change` event.

entries.name: Infinite Masonry Drag Wall
entries.logic: Masonry via CSS `columns`; wrap x/y with `gsap.utils.wrap`; `Draggable` with `inertia`; reposition offscreen tiles on drag end.

entries.name: Multi-Plane Horizontal Parallax
entries.logic: Pin container; `ScrollTrigger` scrubs `xPercent`; layers with `data-speed`; backgrounds move at fraction of foreground.

entries.name: Perspective Tile Scroll Loop
entries.logic: Tile grid shifts via timeline; offscreen tiles wrap; center tiles scale up (1.2) vs edges (0.8) via distance clamping.

entries.name: Reveal-Mask Page Transition
entries.logic: SVG `clipPath` circle/rect; animate `r`/`width` from 0→max; incoming page behind; `ease:"power3.inOut"`.

entries.name: Stateful Event Calendar
entries.logic: Generate day grid; highlight today; store selected in `Set`; prev/next month slides via `gsap.to`.

entries.name: Sticky Scroll-Spy TOC
entries.logic: Parse `h2/h3`; build TOC; `ScrollTrigger` highlights active section; click triggers Lenis smooth scroll.

entries.name: Unbounded Uniform Drag Grid
entries.logic: Uniform grid; `gsap.utils.wrap` on both axes; `Draggable` with `inertia`; bounds dynamically update.

entries.name: Reading Duration Estimator
entries.logic: Count text nodes via `TreeWalker`; divide by 200; inject "X min read"; `MutationObserver` for dynamic content.

entries.name: Z-Index Underlay Fixed Nav
entries.logic: Fixed nav `z-index:1`; hero `z-index:2`; `ScrollTrigger` toggles class for solid background; `pointer-events` auto.

entries.name: Elliptical Orbital Tile Loop
entries.logic: Positions via `Math.sin/cos`; increment angle; wrap at 2PI; simulate depth with `translateZ`.

entries.name: Sticky Header/Col Matrix
entries.logic: Table with sticky header/first column; `ScrollTrigger` for horizontal pin; hover row highlights via `gsap.to`.

entries.name: Quad-Shutter Camera Wipe
entries.logic: Four panels (top/bottom/left/right); animate `scaleX`/`scaleY` 0↔1; staggered `0.1s`; `ease:"power4.inOut"`.

entries.name: Modal-Free Zoom Lens
entries.logic: Scale `1→1.5`; overlay `opacity:0→0.7`; click outside reverts; `ease:"back.out(1.2)"`.

entries.name: Depth-of-Field Progressive Blur
entries.logic: `filter:blur()` mapped via `gsap.utils.mapRange`; throttled to `rAF`; uses `will-change:filter`.

entries.name: Full-Section Scroll Snapper
entries.logic: `ScrollTrigger` `onEnter` with `toggleActions`; `window.scrollTo` smooth; debounced to prevent queue-jumping.

entries.name: Entropy Text Scrambler
entries.logic: On hover, split chars; `setInterval` cycles random chars; final frame decodes; reduced-motion skips scramble.

entries.name: Scroll-Driven Shutter Reveal
entries.logic: Same as shutter but driven by `ScrollTrigger` `scrub:2`; panels open/close with scroll progress.

entries.name: Frosted Glass Backdrop
entries.logic: CSS `backdrop-filter:blur(16px)` + `saturate(1.4)`; border `rgba(255,255,255,0.2)`; no GSAP overhead.

entries.name: Retro Pixel-Disintegration Scroll
entries.logic: Clip-path stepping + blur; `steps(10)` for pixel feel; outgoing pixelates, incoming sharpens.

entries.name: Bezier-Curved Organic Wipe
entries.logic: SVG bezier path as mask; animate `scaleX` 0→1; `ease:"power3.inOut"`; organic reveal.

entries.name: Reel-Style Number Odometer
entries.logic: Tween `{val:0}`→`{val:target}`; `onUpdate` formats with commas; layered digit sprites via `background-position`.

entries.name: Elastic-Stack Sticky Cards
entries.logic: Pin each card; `y` tweens `0→-20` with `back.out(0.5)`; `scale` `0.95→1`; reverse on scroll back.

entries.name: Mapbox Projection Globe
entries.logic: Mapbox GL with `projection:{name:'globe'}`; `pitch`/`bearing` tweened via `gsap.to`; markers with popups.

entries.name: Universal Viewport-Aware Media Driver
entries.logic: IntersectionObserver for autoPlay; `mouseenter` play/`mouseleave` pause; click toggle; `preload:"metadata"`.

entries.name: Direction-Aware Mega-Menu
entries.logic: Detect enter direction via `getBoundingClientRect`; animate `clip-path` from that side; stagger sub-links.

entries.name: Stepped Sticky Progress Indicator
entries.logic: Horizontal/vertical steps; `ScrollTrigger` pins each; connector line fills via `scaleX`/`scaleY`; step dots scale.

entries.name: SVG Path Drawing Trail
entries.logic: On `mousemove`, update SVG `d` with `M x y L x y`; `gsap.to` smooths; cap trail to 50 segments.

entries.name: Pixel-Grid Wave Assembler
entries.logic: 20x20 grid divs; transition out with delay based on row+col (wave); transition in reverse; `steps(1)` ease.

entries.name: Tinder-Style Cascading Deck
entries.logic: Stack offsets; `Draggable` `type:"x"`; fling if threshold exceeded; animate next in; `InertiaPlugin`.

entries.name: Fan-Out Stacked Page Transition
entries.logic: Current page splits into 6 segments; each rotates/scales (fan) to reveal incoming; `stagger:0.05`; `transform-origin:bottom`.

entries.name: Marker-Pen Scroll Reveal
entries.logic: SplitText lines; tween `background-size:0%→100%`; color `rgba(255,255,0,0.4)`; `ScrollTrigger` batch.

entries.name: Rhythmic Column Visualizer
entries.logic: Vertical bars with `scaleY`; wave pattern via `stagger` from center; `sine.inOut`; continuous loop.

entries.name: SVG Stroke-Draw Page Wipe
entries.logic: Large SVG path; `DrawSVGPlugin` draws 0→100%; reveals new page; `ease:"power2.inOut"`.

entries.name: Split-Screen Slide Transition
entries.logic: Old slides left (`x:-100%`); new slides from right; overlap briefly; `ease:"power3.inOut"`.

entries.name: Typographic Wipe Title
entries.logic: Title `clip-path:inset(0 100% 0 0)`→`inset(0 0 0 0)`; overlaps incoming; `ease:"power4.out"`.

entries.name: Overlapping Parallax Stack
entries.logic: Old scales down (`0.9`) & fades; new zooms in (`1.1→1`) & fades; overlap in middle; `power2.inOut`.

entries.name: Column-Sequential Curtain Wipe
entries.logic: 10 vertical columns; each `scaleX`/`x` staggered `0.03s`; `power2.inOut`; curtain effect.

entries.name: Classic Opacity Cross-Fade
entries.logic: Outgoing `1→0`; incoming `0→1`; `power1.inOut`; preload incoming assets.

entries.name: Simple Pixelate In/Out
entries.logic: `filter:blur()` + `image-rendering:pixelated`; scrub blur 0→10px; reverse for incoming.

entries.name: Line-Draw Testimonial Revealer
entries.logic: SVG line draws with `DrawSVGPlugin`; text fades with stagger; `ScrollTrigger` triggers each.

entries.name: Minimalist Showreel Controller
entries.logic: Custom video controls (play/progress/volume); progress updates via `timeupdate`; click to seek.

entries.name: Dual-Phase Scaling Header
entries.logic: Phase 1: logo shrinks; Phase 2: background solidifies; `ScrollTrigger` with markers.

entries.name: Gravity-Drop Card Stack
entries.logic: Cards fall from above to form vertical stack; `bounce.out`; `stagger:0.06`; reusable outside loader.

entries.name: Morphing Feature Pill Expander
entries.logic: Pill `border-radius:50px→8px`; width expands; content fades; reverse on outside click.

entries.name: Directional Rotation Cursor Trail
entries.logic: Cloned images trail cursor; each rotates via `Math.atan2(deltaY,deltaX)`; `quickTo` positions; trail capped at 8.

entries.name: Variable Weight Typography
entries.logic: Tween `font-weight` via CSS custom property `--wght`; `power1.out`; requires variable font.

entries.name: Thumbnail-to-Background Zoom
entries.logic: Thumbnail `scale`/`position` interpolated to fullscreen; `ScrollTrigger` scrub; `transform-origin` from click.

entries.name: Canvas Frame-Sequence Scrub
entries.logic: Preload 120 frames; `ScrollTrigger` scrubs `currentFrame`; `onUpdate` draws to canvas.

entries.name: Pure CSS Data-Attribute Tooltip
entries.logic: `::before`/`::after` with `content:attr(data-tooltip)`; appears on `:hover`; no JS.

entries.name: Inertia-Driven Draggable Ticker
entries.logic: Horizontal marquee; `Draggable` `type:"x"`; `inertia`; dynamic bounds; snap on drag end.

entries.name: CSS Circular Text Rotator
entries.logic: Text arcs via `transform`; parent rotates continuously; pause on hover.

entries.name: Falling Particle Emitter
entries.logic: Spawn divs with `border-radius:50%`; random x/size/duration; `gsap.to` y; recycle on complete.

entries.name: Infinite Wrapping Type Ticker
entries.logic: Clone text nodes; `ScrollTrigger` drives `xPercent`; `gsap.utils.wrap` for infinite loop.

entries.name: Rotating Word Carousel
entries.logic: Word array; timeline loops: fade out, slide next in (`y:20→0`); `repeat:-1`; `power2.inOut`.

entries.name: Vertical Stacking Image Trail
entries.logic: Images stack vertically behind cursor with `y` offset; each fades `opacity`; trail limit 10.

entries.name: Scroll-Driven Path Follower
entries.logic: `MotionPathPlugin` positions dot; `stroke-dashoffset` draws path; both scrubbed by `ScrollTrigger`; `autoRotate`.

entries.name: Real-Time List.js Filter
entries.logic: Instantiate `List.js`; search triggers `list.search()`; debounce 300ms; highlight matches.

entries.name: Overlapping Card Swipe
entries.logic: Slides overlap by 30%; `Draggable` `type:"x"`; `inertia`; snap to card index.

entries.name: Mascot-Walking Splash Loader
entries.logic: SVG character walks (sprite/morph); loader progress mapped to walk cycle; fades on complete.

entries.name: Stateful Download Trigger
entries.logic: Click triggers download; button shows spinner; on success morphs to checkmark via `gsap.to`; resets after 3s.

entries.name: Step-Based Geometric Loader
entries.logic: Geometric shapes animate with `steps(4)`; crisp staccato loading sequence.

entries.name: Mouse-Driven Refraction Distortion
entries.logic: Canvas pixel displacement; mouse controls warp grid; `gsap.utils.lerp` smoothing.

entries.name: Oversized Typography Full Nav
entries.logic: Overlay menu; links scale `0.8→1`; stagger in with `y:-30`; `backdrop-filter` blur.

entries.name: Live Mouse Coordinate Display
entries.logic: Two spans for X/Y; update via `mousemove`; `gsap.to` for smooth visual; click to copy.

entries.name: Elastic Pulse Interaction
entries.logic: Hover scales with `elastic.out(1,0.3)`; click pulses `0.9→1.1→1`; timeline ease.

entries.name: Horizontally Pinned Scroller
entries.logic: Container pinned; `ScrollTrigger` scrubs `x`; optional snap for section alignment.

entries.name: Live-Updated Weekly Timetable
entries.logic: Grid layout; `getDay()` highlights current; store hours in object; dynamic classes.

entries.name: Mouse-Tilt 3D Card
entries.logic: `mousemove` calculates `rotateX/Y` via `mapRange`; clamp ±15deg; `perspective:1000px`; `quickTo`.

entries.name: Bottom-Reveal Parallax Footer
entries.logic: Footer `position:sticky`; as content scrolls up, footer accelerates via `translateY`.

entries.name: Layout State Flip Animator
entries.logic: `Flip.getState` before class change; `Flip.from` animates grid layout changes.

entries.name: Native Share-Intent Group
entries.logic: Click opens `window.open` for Twitter/LinkedIn/Facebook; `navigator.share` on mobile.

entries.name: Swiper.js Instantiation Wizard
entries.logic: Configure Swiper with pagination/navigation/autoplay; breakpoints; pause on hover.

entries.name: Live Date-Difference Countdown
entries.logic: `setInterval` computes diff; converts to days/hrs/mins/secs; stops at zero; emits `complete`.

entries.name: Magnetic Attraction Button
entries.logic: On hover, button `x`/`y` shifts toward mouse with `clamp`; `quickTo`; snaps back on leave.

entries.name: Advanced HLS Lightbox
entries.logic: HLS.js with quality selector, PIP, custom controls; volume persists in localStorage.

entries.name: Muted HLS Background Stream
entries.logic: HLS.js auto-loads; `muted:true`; `autoplay:true`; fallback poster on error.

entries.name: Minimal Custom HLS Player
entries.logic: HLS.js with play/pause + volume slider; error recovery.

entries.name: Morphing Logo Splash Loader
entries.logic: Logo SVG morphs via `MorphSVGPlugin`; scales up then settles; `power4.out`; fades loader.

entries.name: Full-Featured HLS Suite
entries.logic: HLS.js + scrubber, speed (0.5-2x), quality, fullscreen; keyboard shortcuts.

entries.name: Sticky Feature Stack Carousel
entries.logic: Features pin and stack vertically; each pushes previous up; `ScrollTrigger` with `pinSpacing`.

entries.name: Scroll-Accelerated 3D Globe
entries.logic: Globe rotation speed mapped to scroll depth via `mapRange`; `scrub:2`; smooth deceleration.

entries.name: Diagonal Slant Background Button
entries.logic: `::before` with `skewX`; `scaleX` 0→1 on hover; `transform-origin:left`; diagonal reveal.

entries.name: Marquee-Text Embedded Cursor
entries.logic: Custom cursor div contains scrolling text; `translateX` loop; size adapts to text length.

entries.name: Internal Parallax in Stacked Cards
entries.logic: Each card has background layer; `ScrollTrigger` moves background at different speed; creates depth.

entries.name: AND-Logic Multi-Category Filter
entries.logic: Selected tags in Set; show items where ALL selected; `Array.every`; animated show/hide.

entries.name: Single-Category Toggle Filter
entries.logic: Radio/button group; show only selected category; `data-category` match; `power1.out`.

entries.name: Staggered Viewport-Reveal Engine
entries.logic: `ScrollTrigger.batch()` on `.reveal`; `from` opacity/y; `stagger:0.05`; auto threshold.

entries.name: Pixelated Image Disintegration
entries.logic: `filter:blur()` + `pixelated` + `clip-path:inset()` stepped; dissolves on hover.

entries.name: 3D Cylindrical Carousel
entries.logic: Images on `rotateY` increments; `Draggable` `type:"rotation"`; `InertiaPlugin` snap.

entries.name: Direction-Aware Slide List
entries.logic: Detect enter direction via `bound`; animate item sliding from that side; `power2.out`.

entries.name: Dynamic Image-Preview Cursor
entries.logic: Cursor changes to thumbnail of hovered link; `quickTo`; preload via `new Image()`.

entries.name: Breathing Logo Wall Animation
entries.logic: Logos cycle opacity/scale in wave pattern; stagger based on grid position; infinite loop.

entries.name: Responsive CSS Masonry Grid
entries.logic: Uses CSS `columns` with `break-inside:avoid`; no JS needed.

entries.name: Tinder-Style Flick Swiper
entries.logic: Card follows `x`/`rotation` on drag; if threshold exceeded, fling off; next animates in; `InertiaPlugin`.

entries.name: Smart Back-to-Top Button
entries.logic: Appears after 400px via `ScrollTrigger`; click tweens `window.scrollTo` with `power2.inOut`; hides at bottom.

entries.name: Cognizant Mascot Face Tracker
entries.logic: SVG pupils track mouse via `clamp`; blink timeline every 4s; head tilts slightly.

entries.name: Nested Multi-Level Accordion Menu
entries.logic: 3-level deep dropdown; each submenu slides in (`x:20→0`); `aria-expanded` toggled.

entries.name: Tilt & Bounce Hybrid Button
entries.logic: On hover, tilts `rotateX/Y` ±5deg and bounces `y` with `elastic.out`; combines perspective + physics.

entries.name: Core GSAP Slide Translator
entries.logic: Basic slide via `x`; next/prev buttons; `power2.inOut`; autoplay optional.

entries.name: SVG Path Element Scrubber
entries.logic: Element follows path via `MotionPathPlugin`; `ScrollTrigger` drives `progress`; `autoRotate`.

entries.name: Locomotive + ScrollTrigger Proxy
entries.logic: Integrates `locomotive-scroll` with `ScrollTrigger.scrollerProxy`; syncs GSAP with smooth scroll.

entries.name: Lottie Web Playback Controller
entries.logic: Load JSON via `lottie.loadAnimation`; play/pause/seek; `loop:true`; resize observer.

entries.name: Static CSS URI Cursor
entries.logic: `cursor: url('path.png') 16 16, auto`; no JS.

entries.name: Lazy-Load Play-on-Hover Video
entries.logic: `preload:"none"`; `mouseenter` loads+plays; `mouseleave` pauses+unloads; `IntersectionObserver`.

entries.name: WhatsApp QR Code Modal
entries.logic: QRCode.js generates `wa.me` link; modal overlay; click to download QR.

entries.name: Stacked Drag-to-Reveal Deck
entries.logic: Cards offset by `y:10`; drag top card to reveal; snap to open/closed; `back.out`.

entries.name: Data-Attribute Global Parallax
entries.logic: Select `[data-speed]`; scroll maps `data-speed` to `yPercent`; `will-change` optimization.

entries.name: Physics-Based Falling Text
entries.logic: `Physics2DPlugin` with `gravity:500`; chars fall; `bounce:0.7`; recycle on complete.

entries.name: Scroll-Activated Word Highlighter
entries.logic: `SplitText` words; `ScrollTrigger` toggles `active`; background sweep; `stagger:0.02`.

entries.name: Squiggly Random Underline Draw
entries.logic: SVG path with random `d` curve; `drawSVG` 0→100% on hover; regenerates each hover.

entries.name: Typing-Intro Loader Sequence
entries.logic: `SplitText` chars; stagger opacity/y from bottom; `power2.out`; fades loader on complete.

entries.name: 404 Interactive Distractor
entries.logic: Canvas game (dino jump/snake); `rAF`; keyboard controls; high score in sessionStorage.

entries.name: Clip-Path Text Reveal
entries.logic: `SplitText` lines; `clip-path:inset(0 100% 0 0)`→`inset(0 0 0 0)`; `power3.out`.

entries.name: Accessibility Attribute Toggler
entries.logic: Toggle `aria-expanded`, `aria-hidden`; `setAttribute`; `prefers-reduced-motion` check.

entries.name: Hero-to-Header Scale Nav
entries.logic: Nav scales from hero-center to header-top-left; `ScrollTrigger` maps scale/y/x; `transform-origin` adapts.

entries.name: Dynamic Numeric DOM Injector
entries.logic: Takes `data-count` target; inserts number with `gsap.to` on `innerText`.

entries.name: Freeform Draggable Sticker Canvas
entries.logic: `Draggable` with `type:"x,y"`; `bounds` parent; `inertia:false`; snap to grid optional.

entries.name: Advanced Vimeo Lightbox
entries.logic: Vimeo Player API; custom controls (play/progress/quality); autoplay on open.

entries.name: Pinned Section Title Overlay
entries.logic: Title pins to top via `pin`; content scrolls underneath; fades at section end.

entries.name: Scroll-Triggered Flip State Change
entries.logic: `Flip.getState` before tween; `Flip.from` animates state; `ScrollTrigger` drives.

entries.name: Clipboard Email Copier
entries.logic: `navigator.clipboard.writeText`; button changes to "Copied!"; resets after 2s; fallback prompt.

entries.name: Matter.js Collision Physics
entries.logic: Matter.js engine; drop rectangles/circles; collision events; GSAP removal.

entries.name: Center-Focused Infinite Looper
entries.logic: Current slide centered/scaled 1.2; neighbors 0.8; auto-loop timeline; drag to interrupt.

entries.name: Vertical Scroll-Progress Sidebar
entries.logic: Side dots; connecting line `scaleY`; `ScrollTrigger` highlights; click scrolls to section.

entries.name: 360° Rotating Icon on Hover
entries.logic: `gsap.to` icon `rotate:360`; `power2.out`; supports SVG inline.

entries.name: Thumbnail-Driven Main Parallax
entries.logic: Hover thumbnail triggers main image transition with `x`/`scale` parallax; `power3.out`.

entries.name: Hamburger-to-Close Morph Scale
entries.logic: Three lines: top rotates 45°, middle fades, bottom -45°; `power2.inOut`; scale transition.

entries.name: Draggable Split Comparator
entries.logic: Two images; `clip-path:inset(0 X% 0 0)` controlled by `Draggable` handle.

entries.name: Scroll-Progress Video Scrubber
entries.logic: Tween `video.currentTime` via `ScrollTrigger` scrub; duration mapped to video length.

entries.name: Shimmering Skeleton Text Loader
entries.logic: CSS `linear-gradient` shimmer at 45°; `background-size:200%`; infinite animation.

entries.name: Flickity Cell Carousel
entries.logic: Instantiate `Flickity` with `wrapAround`, `cellAlign`; custom arrows.

entries.name: Proximity-Activated Pixel Grid
entries.logic: Grid cells; `gsap.utils.distance` to mouse; map to scale/brightness; `quickTo`; throttled.

entries.name: CSS Keyframe Infinite Marquee
entries.logic: `@keyframes` `translateX` 0→-100%; `linear infinite`; pause on hover.

entries.name: Velocity-Responsive Dynamic Cursor
entries.logic: Calculate delta per frame; map to scale (1-3) and hue rotation; `gsap.to` updates.

entries.name: CSS Steps Stop-Motion Button
entries.logic: `animation: sprite 1s steps(4) infinite`; background-position shifts frame by frame.

entries.name: Persistent Theme System
entries.logic: CSS custom properties; toggle `class="dark"`; store in localStorage; `prefers-color-scheme` fallback.

entries.name: Vanilla JS Image Lightbox
entries.logic: Modal with `img`; navigation arrows; `Esc` close; focus trap; `gsap` scale open.

entries.name: Howler.js Custom Audio Player
entries.logic: Howl instance; custom scrubber, volume, speed; UI updates via `onplay`/`onend`.

entries.name: Auto-Fading Image Slideshow
entries.logic: Timeline loops; fade between images; pause on hover; `power2.inOut`.

entries.name: Unified Text Scramble Engine
entries.logic: Triggers on load/scroll/hover; char loop; `setInterval` random; decodes to target.

entries.name: Trailing Image Path Behind Cursor
entries.logic: Cloned images trail cursor with delay; new images added on move; cap at 15.

entries.name: Single-Category Basic Filter
entries.logic: Single select; hide/show via `data-category`; `power1.out` for grid items.

entries.name: CSS-Only :target Tab System
entries.logic: Uses `:target` or radio buttons; no JS.

entries.name: Tab-Blur Page Title Swap
entries.logic: `document.addEventListener('visibilitychange')`; on hidden, change title; restore on visible.

entries.name: Muted Vimeo Background
entries.logic: Vimeo Player API; autoplay muted; loop.

entries.name: Auto-Rotating Tab System
entries.logic: Tabs cycle automatically with fade; pause on hover; `gsap.timeline` loop.

entries.name: CSS Character-Stagger Button
entries.logic: Text split into spans; each animated with CSS `animation-delay` stagger.

entries.name: Scale/Fade Basic Modal
entries.logic: Modal opens with `scale`/`fade`; overlay close; X button; focus trap.

entries.name: Checkbox-Hack CSS Toggle
entries.logic: Hidden checkbox + `:checked` pseudo-class; toggles states without JS.

entries.name: Basic Live Form Validation
entries.logic: Validate on input/blur; display error messages; required/email patterns.

entries.name: Scroll-Activated Section Theming
entries.logic: Detect active section via `ScrollTrigger`; change nav/page theme color dynamically.

entries.name: Hamburger-to-Close Morph
entries.logic: Three lines; top/bottom rotate to X; middle fades; `power2.inOut`.

entries.name: Cursor Drawing Canvas
entries.logic: Canvas element; `mousemove` draws lines; `lineTo`; `stroke`; configurable color/size.

entries.name: Basic Custom Vimeo Player
entries.logic: Vimeo Player API; play/pause + progress.

entries.name: Advanced Custom Vimeo Player
entries.logic: Full controls: quality, speed, volume, fullscreen.

entries.name: CSS Max-Height Accordion
entries.logic: `max-height` transition; pure CSS; `overflow:hidden`.

entries.name: Scroll-Direction Reversing Marquee
entries.logic: Detects scroll direction; changes `translateX` direction accordingly.

entries.name: Scroll Direction Detector
entries.logic: Compare `window.scrollY` with previous; output 'up'/'down' via event.

entries.name: Magnetic Hover Attraction
entries.logic: Button moves toward cursor with clamp; `quickTo`; `power2.out`; snap back.

entries.name: Lenis Smooth Anchor Scroll
entries.logic: `lenis.scrollTo` with offset; click nav links; smooth easing.

entries.name: Lenis Smooth Scroll Engine
entries.logic: Initialize Lenis with easing/wheel; integrate with GSAP.

entries.name: Physics2D Cursor Confetti
entries.logic: On click, burst 30 colored divs; `Physics2DPlugin` with random velocity/angle/gravity.

entries.name: Live Real-Time Clock
entries.logic: `setInterval` updates hours:minutes:seconds; `toLocaleTimeString`.

entries.name: Play-to-Pause SVG Morph
entries.logic: `MorphSVGPlugin` morphs triangle to two bars on click.

entries.name: Scroll Percentage Number
entries.logic: `ScrollTrigger` updates 0-100%; `onUpdate` sets `innerText`.

entries.name: Top Scroll Progress Bar
entries.logic: Horizontal bar; `ScrollTrigger` updates `scaleX` from 0→1.

entries.name: Falling Emoji Rain
entries.logic: Spawn emojis with random sizes/speeds; fall with `gsap.to`; recycle.

entries.name: Simple Lagging Custom Cursor
entries.logic: Circle cursor; `quickTo` with 0.2s lag; `opacity`/`scale` toggles.

entries.name: Direction-Sensing Button Background
entries.logic: Background slides from mouse enter direction; `bound` detection.

entries.name: 3-Step Percentage Loader
entries.logic: Counts 0→100% in three phases; each with different ease; `onUpdate`.

entries.name: Arrow-to-Speech-Bubble Morph
entries.logic: Arrow morphs into bubble tail on hover; `gsap.to` path/background.

entries.name: Draw-In Underline on Hover
entries.logic: `::after` with `scaleX` 0→1; `transform-origin:left`; `power2.out`.

entries.name: Advanced Multi-Rule Form Validator
entries.logic: Custom rules (password match, min length, pattern); real-time feedback; submit handler.

entries.name: Time-Based Expiring Badge
entries.logic: Checks sessionStorage or date; removes "New" badge after X days or first view.

entries.name: Context-Aware Text Cursor
entries.logic: Cursor text changes based on hovered element (`data-cursor` attribute); `quickTo`.

entries.name: Classic Infinite Draggable Slider
entries.logic: Clones slides; `Draggable` with `type:"x"`; `InertiaPlugin`; `gsap.utils.wrap`; snap on drag end.

entries.name: Off-Canvas Side Nav with Wipe
entries.logic: Side nav slides in; content behind wipes (clip-path) away; `timeline`.

entries.name: Fluid Viewport Scaling System
entries.logic: `gsap.utils.mapRange` maps viewport width to font-size/scale; `ResizeObserver` rebinds.

entries.name: Auto-Copyright Year Injector
entries.logic: `new Date().getFullYear()`; injects into footer.

entries.name: Multi-Layer Image Parallax
entries.logic: Foreground/middle/background layers; `ScrollTrigger` moves each at different speeds.

entries.name: Apple-Style Scaling Dock
entries.logic: Icons scale up on mouse approach; neighboring icons scale slightly; `quickTo` with distance.

entries.name: Rotating Word Selector with Highlight
entries.logic: Word array; current word highlighted via underline/background; cycles with timeline.

entries.name: Pixelated-to-Sharp Image Reveal
entries.logic: Image starts pixelated (`blur`/`pixelated`); sharpens on scroll/hover.

entries.name: GLSL Disintegration Page Transition
entries.logic: Replaces CSS clip-paths with a Three.js `ShaderPass`. On scroll/click, GSAP scrubs a `uniform uProgress` (0→1). The fragment shader displaces the old page using a water ripple or glitch matrix effect while assembling the new page.

entries.name: Scroll-Driven 3D Topological Morph
entries.logic: A Three.js mesh with 500 vertices morphs between a Cube, Sphere, and TorusKnot. GSAP listens to `ScrollTrigger` and maps progress to the `morphTargetInfluences` array. Uses `onUpdate` to recalculate normals.

entries.name: Interactive 3D Point Cloud Depth
entries.logic: Uses Three.js `Points` with 50,000 vertices arranged in a flat grid. On `mousemove`, GSAP `quickTo` applies a wave displacement to the `z` axis of nearby vertices (simulating an ocean surface), layered with a `sin` time uniform.

entries.name: Volumetric Light Ray Cursor
entries.logic: Combines Three.js `FogExp2` with a custom `Mesh` (cone) that follows the mouse. GSAP animates the `opacity` and `scale` of the volumetric cone. As the cursor moves, it dynamically "illuminates" floating dust particles (Points).

entries.name: 3D Matter.js + Three.js Hybrid Physics
entries.logic: Matter.js runs the 2D physics engine (collisions/gravity) but drives the `position` and `rotation` of Three.js 3D rendered cubes (extruded boxes). GSAP orchestrates the initial cascade drop (staggered release of 30 physics bodies).

entries.name: Real-time WebGL Glowing Orbs
entries.logic: Generates 20 animated Three.js `SphereGeometry` meshes with `MeshPhysicalMaterial` (clearcoat/roughness). GSAP continuously loops a stagger animation, tweening their `scale` and `position` along a spherical Lissajous curve. Uses `unrealBloomPass` for a glowing, ethereal aesthetic.

entries.name: 3D Fat Cursor Drawing Trail
entries.logic: Uses `three-mesh-bvh` or `MeshLine` library. The cursor draws an extruded 3D tube/path in real-time. GSAP records mouse deltas and feeds them to the geometry's `setPoints()`, creating a dynamic, ribbon-like 3D sculpture that follows the user.

entries.name: Holographic Image Deconstruction
entries.logic: An image is mapped onto a Three.js `PlaneGeometry` with 100x100 subdivisions. On hover, GSAP triggers a shader where the vertices scale outward from the center (breaking apart like hologram shards) while applying a scanline fragment effect.

entries.name: Scroll-Activated Simplex Terrain
entries.logic: Generates a flat `PlaneGeometry`. Using `simplex-noise` inside a custom shader, GSAP scrolls a `uTime` uniform that moves the vertices up/down (mountains/valleys) in real-time. A Three.js `DirectionalLight` highlights the terrain as it morphs.

entries.name: Audio-Reactive WebGL Visualizer
entries.logic: Uses `WebAudio` `AnalyserNode` to process microphone or an audio file. GSAP doesn't loop; instead, it pipes the frequency data to Three.js uniforms. The `SphereGeometry` or `BoxGeometry` vertices stretch outward based on bass/treble, creating a 3D oscilloscope inside the hero section.
